title: Garam Masala
subTitle: A flirtatious photographer juggles three air hostesses behind his fiancée's back. However, the facade unravels when his friend-turned-enemy starts snooping around.

title: Masoom
subTitle: D K Malhotra leads a peaceful life with his wife and two daughters. But all of this changes when he is forced to bring a boy, who is his son from a previous relationship, home after his mother dies.

title: Mashaal
subTitle: After being dismissed from his job as a newspaper editor, Vinod Kumar relocates to the slums of Bombay and starts his own publication.

title: Jai Kishen
subTitle: Jai, a man who is visually impaired, discovers that he has a twin brother, Kishen, who was separated from him on the day his father was murdered. Thus, begins his quest for revenge with his sibling.

title: Aakhri Adalat
subTitle: An honest police officer decides to take the law into his own hands when he loses his job, and the thugs he caught get released due to some technicality.

title: Hum Dil De Chuke Sanam
subTitle: A newly-wed man discovers that his wife is in love with another man and decides to unite them. Ignoring the ridicule he might have to face for this, he takes his wife to Italy in search of her love.

title: Aunty No. 1
subTitle: To help his friends, Gopi dresses up as their aunt to solve their problems. However, he gets into a hilarious situation where he must avoid two suitors trying to woo him.

title: Tridev
subTitle: When an expelled police inspector, an outlaw and a commissioner's son are implicated by a dealer, they unite to seek revenge and prove they are not culprits.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: College friends Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: College friends Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

title: Naina
subTitle: After years of blindness caused by an accident, Naina gets a successful cornea transplant. However, she soon begins to see terrifying visions that prompt her to investigate the source of her sight.

title: Bal Ganesh And Friends From Zeba V- 2018
subTitle: Bal Ganesh and his devotees, Topi, Dhoti and Suit-Boot travel to the planet of Zeba, experiencing adventures and creating unforgettable memories.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Kartoos
subTitle: ACP Jay Suryavanshi assigns an inmate on death row, Jeet, the task of killing Jagat, a terrorist. Things take a turn when Jeet falls in love with Mini and gets distracted from his mission.

title: Aatank
subTitle: Conflict ensues in a seaside town after two orphans stumble upon a trove of priceless pearls. The revelation leads to the discovery of a ferocious man-eating shark hunting in their vicinity.

title: Bhoothnath
subTitle: When a mischievous ghost returns to his ancestral home, chaos unfolds with both humor and heart as he tries to protect his family and teach valuable lessons to the living.

title: Jai Vikraanta
subTitle: When a poor, honest farmer from rural India is killed by a greedy landlord, his son, Vikraanta, takes a vow to avenge his murder.

title: Haqeeqat
subTitle: Shiva changes his name to Ajay as he leaves his criminal life after saving a police officer and his family. He falls in love with a widow and marries her, but his past comes back to haunt him.

title: Dil Hai Tumhaara
subTitle: Sarita raises Shalu, her spouse's love child, and her daughter, Nimmi, but she does not forgive Shalu's past. When she discovers that Shalu is growing close to Nimmi's lover, things become worse.

title: The Burning Train
subTitle: Vinod, a railway engineer, launches the Super Express, a dream project that is India's fastest passenger train. However, it goes out of control on its maiden journey due to a bomb planted by a rival.

title: The Burning Train
subTitle: Vinod, a railway engineer, launches the Super Express, a dream project that is India's fastest passenger train. However, it goes out of control on its maiden journey due to a bomb planted by a rival.

title: Vaada Raha...I Promise
subTitle: Duke Chawla leads a perfect life with a good job and a beautiful girlfriend. However, when he meets with an accident, his life changes forever.

title: Gair Kaanooni
subTitle: Police Inspector Kapil Khanna realises that his baby boy has been switched with a girl child by the hospital and files a lawsuit against the owner, Robert Decosta while trying to find his missing son.
